title: ophrys × tisserandii
intro: Ophrys × tisserandii, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × tisserandii include its ability to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Ophrys × tisserandii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
